title: stelis oscarii
intro: Stelis oscarii, a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America, is a type of epiphytic orchid characterized by its unique, white or purple flowers. Traditionally, Stelis oscarii has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, Stelis oscarii is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots are sometimes dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
